name: Chickinadici Ala Nica Basil Sausa Con Fromage
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the chicken breasts.
2. Marinate the breast pieces in milk for 1 hour.
3. Melt butter in a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat.
4. Add heavy cream and sherry to the saucepan on low heat, stirring constantly.
5. Shake the stock with cornstarch and add it to the saucepan.
6. Stir in basil leaves, black pepper, grated Romano cheese, grated Parmesan cheese, bread crumbs, garlic powder, and onion powder.
7. Continue cooking until the sauce thickens, becomes rich, and aromatic (at least 15 minutes).
8. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
9. Grease a cookie sheet with olive oil.
10. Roll the milk-soaked chicken breast pieces in seasoned bread crumbs.
11. Place the breasts on the greased cookie sheet for a few minutes.
12. Bake for 10-12 minutes.
13. Two minutes before the cooking time is complete, remove the breasts and spoon sauce over them.
14. Serve immediately on an ornate Venetian gold leaf platter with long-stemmed parsley and spring onion garnish. The sauce can be served in a hand-painted tureen from Torino.
Source: A World-famous recipe handed down from the Borgia Popes to ~Johnc-. It won 47 prizes in Paris, France for culinary exuberance. (Attribution line removed)
